introSection: Fruit Worm Coaster (Chinese: 虫虫特工队) was a kiddie roller coaster located at Huagudeng Carnival in Bengshan, Bengbu, Anhui, China. It was manufactured by Jinma Rides.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride had an oval track layout, and the track goes through an apple.

fullText:
Fruit Worm Coaster (Chinese: 虫虫特工队) was a kiddie roller coaster located at Huagudeng Carnival in Bengshan, Bengbu, Anhui, China. It was manufactured by Jinma Rides.

The ride had an oval track layout, and the track goes through an apple.
